raw_consumer_statement:
DISPUTE CASE ID : XXXX I filed a dispute for a {$42.00} charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX  on my XXXX ThankYou credit card ( issued by Citi ). I believe this charge should have been removed since I submitted the dispute through the correct process. 

However, the dispute was closed not in my favor with the reason given : Your response was not received in a timely manner. 

I strongly believe this is inaccurate. I responded on time with everything Citi requested. Throughout the process, I was not given any direct line of communication with Citis dispute team, only access to general customer service. I contacted them during the early stages and was told I would not be able to speak with anyone from the dispute department and should instead wait for a response.

77 days later, I received a vague response that I believe is 100 % incorrect. I submitted everything in a timely and complete manner. When I attempted to get more information or escalate the case, I found that customer service agents had no access to the dispute documentation. I eventually spoke with a customer service supervisor named XXXX, who gave me Case ID # XXXX. However, he was not a dispute expert, had no insight into the actual case, and simply advised me to open a new dispute and resubmit everything ; essentially restarting the process from scratch.
